config.name: CPG Morning Brief — Revenue

data.dsp_query: SELECT date_trunc('day', posting_date) AS d, plant, material_group, SUM(net_value) AS revenue FROM /BIC/VSALES WHERE posting_date >= ADD_DAYS(CURRENT_DATE, -7) GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 60

semantic.cypher: MATCH (o:DspObject)-[:DOMAIN_OF]->(d:Domain {name: 'Sales'}) RETURN o.id AS id, d.name AS domain LIMIT 20

external.searxng_query: CPG consumer goods revenue sales news

config.name: CPG Weekly Sell-Through

data.dsp_query: SELECT WEEKOFYEAR(billing_date) AS wk, material, distribution_channel, SUM(billed_quantity) AS qty_sold, SUM(net_value) AS revenue FROM VBAP WHERE billing_date >= ADD_MONTHS(CURRENT_DATE, -3) GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 100

semantic.cypher: MATCH (o:DspObject {kind: 'material'}) RETURN o.id AS id, o.name AS name LIMIT 30

config.name: CPG Out-of-Stock Ranking

data.dsp_query: SELECT m.matnr AS material_id, m.maktx AS description, s.lgpbe AS storage_bin, s.labst AS unrestricted_stock, s.eisbe AS safety_stock FROM MARA m JOIN MARD s ON m.matnr = s.matnr WHERE s.labst <= s.eisbe ORDER BY (s.labst / NULLIFZERO(s.eisbe)) ASC LIMIT 50

semantic.cypher: MATCH (o:DspObject {kind: 'material'})-[:LINKED_TO]->(d:DspObject {kind: 'plant'}) RETURN o.id AS id, d.name AS plant LIMIT 50

config.name: CPG Price Anomaly Explainer

data.dsp_query: SELECT matnr AS material_id, maktx AS description, kbetr AS price, konwa AS currency, datab AS valid_from, datbi AS valid_to FROM A004 WHERE datab <= CURRENT_DATE AND datbi >= CURRENT_DATE AND kbetr NOT BETWEEN :price_min AND :price_max LIMIT 20

semantic.cypher: MATCH (o:DspObject)-[:HAS_PRICE]->(p) WHERE o.id IN $ids RETURN o.id AS id, p.value AS hist_price LIMIT 20

config.name: CPG Promo Lift Summary

data.dsp_query: SELECT c.kunnr AS customer, c.vbeln AS promo_order, c.knumv AS cond_doc, p.kbetr AS discount_pct, p.kwert AS discount_value, SUM(i.netwr) AS net_revenue FROM VBKD c JOIN VBAP i ON c.vbeln = i.vbeln JOIN KONV p ON c.knumv = p.knumv WHERE c.bstnk LIKE 'PROMO%' AND i.erdat >= ADD_DAYS(CURRENT_DATE, -30) GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 ORDER BY 5 DESC LIMIT 50

semantic.cypher: MATCH (o:DspObject {kind: 'customer'})-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(pr:DspObject {kind: 'promotion'}) RETURN o.id AS id, pr.name AS promo LIMIT 30

config.name: CPG Category Heatmap KPIs

data.dsp_query: SELECT matkl AS material_group, COUNT(DISTINCT matnr) AS sku_count, SUM(dmbtr) AS cogs, SUM(netwr) AS revenue, (SUM(netwr) - SUM(dmbtr)) / NULLIFZERO(SUM(netwr)) * 100 AS gross_margin_pct FROM VBAP WHERE erdat >= ADD_MONTHS(CURRENT_DATE, -3) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY gross_margin_pct DESC LIMIT 30

semantic.cypher: MATCH (c:DspObject {kind: 'material_group'}) RETURN c.id AS id, c.name AS name LIMIT 30

config.name: CPG Supplier Scorecard

data.dsp_query: SELECT l.lifnr AS supplier_id, l.name1 AS supplier_name, COUNT(e.ebeln) AS po_count, AVG(DATEDIFF(DAY, e.bedat, w.budat)) AS avg_lead_days, SUM(CASE WHEN w.budat > e.eindt THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_deliveries, SUM(q.brgew) AS total_weight_kg FROM LFA1 l JOIN EKKO e ON l.lifnr = e.lifnr JOIN EKPO p ON e.ebeln = p.ebeln LEFT JOIN MSEG w ON w.ebeln = e.ebeln LEFT JOIN MARA q ON p.matnr = q.matnr WHERE e.bedat >= ADD_MONTHS(CURRENT_DATE, -6) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY late_deliveries DESC LIMIT 25

semantic.cypher: MATCH (s:DspObject {kind: 'supplier'})-[:SUPPLIES]->(m:DspObject {kind: 'material'}) RETURN s.id AS id, count(m) AS material_count LIMIT 25

config.prompt_template:
You are a procurement analyst. Produce a supplier quality scorecard.

Supplier performance (last 6 months):
{% for row in dsp_data %}- {{ row.supplier_name }} ({{ row.supplier_id }}): {{ row.po_count }} POs, avg lead {{ row.avg_lead_days | round(1) }} days, {{ row.late_deliveries }} late
{% endfor %}

Return JSON: suppliers (array of {supplier_id, name, score 0-100, on_time_rate_pct, risk_level low|medium|high, recommendation string}), ordered by score descending.

config.name: CPG SKU Description Refiner

data.dsp_query: SELECT matnr AS material_id, maktx AS short_description, maktg AS long_description, mtart AS material_type, matkl AS material_group, meins AS base_uom FROM MARA m JOIN MAKT t ON m.matnr = t.matnr WHERE t.spras = 'EN' AND (LENGTH(TRIM(maktg)) < 20 OR maktg IS NULL) LIMIT 100

semantic.cypher: MATCH (o:DspObject {kind: 'material'}) WHERE o.description IS NULL OR size(o.description) < 20 RETURN o.id AS id, o.name AS name LIMIT 100
